global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with a clear call to action.

elements.label: Orange background
elements.description: A solid orange background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Three icons
elements.description: Three rectangular icons arranged horizontally, outlined with a thin border, suggesting a selection of items.

elements.label: BiteRush logo
elements.description: The text 'BiteRush' in a bold, modern font, prominently displayed at the top.

elements.label: Cravings text
elements.description: The phrase 'Your cravings, delivered' in a large, clear font, centered below the logo.

elements.label: Late night deals
elements.description: The text 'Late night deals available' in a smaller font, positioned just below the main body text.

elements.label: Get offer button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Get offer' in a bold font, designed to stand out against the background.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small, rectangular element that is not clearly defined in purpose or content.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: Another small, rectangular element that lacks clear identification.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small, vertical element that appears to be an icon or graphic, but its purpose is unclear.

elements.label: Bottom section
elements.description: A large area at the bottom of the ad that contains the main call to action and additional text.
elements.text_content: Your cravings, delivered Late ble Get offer

elements.label: BiteRush logo
elements.description: The logo of 'BiteRush' displayed prominently at the top of the ad.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small badge with the word 'SALE' in bold letters, positioned at the top right corner.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main body text, and the CTA button is at the bottom.
